title: Fat Freddy's Drop
full_description: Fat Freddy's Drop betovert hun publiek met euforische, diafragma-vernietigende muziek. The independent band from New Zealand emerged from Wellington's underground dance scene in 1999 as a genre-crossing powerhouse, combining dub, reggae, soul, jazz and rhythm and blues. Their live performances deliver a noisy, joyful, undefinable sound. The 2026 Paradiso shows mark their return to perform their debut album Based On A True Story — following the death of founding member Chris 'MU' Faiumu.
ai_summary: New Zealand's beloved seven-piece genre-blending collective — dub, reggae, soul, jazz, and electronic all at once — return to Paradiso for three sold-out nights performing their debut album Based On A True Story. A bittersweet homecoming after the passing of founding member Chris 'MU' Faiumu.
